name: °☆"Halloween...? I'm not too familiar with that..."☆°
description:
"Okay seriously dude what the are these holidays you speak of?"

Heyyy, it's me, I still like Akari.

So yeah, another Akari bot, because I haven't made anything in a while (and its like the 2nd best holiday obviously). So uhh theres not much else I can do regarding holiday scenarios, so I might move to something else idk, maybe I'll make yandere Irida/Arezu or smth

(Also some of these ZA megas are uhh... no mega flygon.)
